{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Support Officer",
  "description": "TeamAce Limited - Our client, a reputable organization in the Fintech sector, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Support Officer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As the Customer Support Officer, you will manage customer interactions, resolve issues efficiently, and ensure a seamless user experience across all customer touchpoints while supporting overall service delivery.


Responsibilities


	Respond to customer inquiries across multiple channels (email, chat, and other platforms)
	Resolve customer complaints promptly and escalate complex issues when necessary
	Maintain accurate records of customer interactions and transactions
	Collaborate with internal teams (Tech, Compliance, Operations) to resolve customer issues
	Monitor recurring issues and provide feedback to improve service processes


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Communications, or related field
	1&ndash;3 years of experience in customer support, preferably within fintech or a fast-paced environment
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Proficiency in customer support tools and basic Microsoft Office applications
	High attention to detail with strong problem-solving and multitasking ability.


Salary
N350,000 - N450,000 monthly; Open to Negotiation.",

Customer Support Officer Job at TeamAce Limited




        
    

        
        TeamAce Limited - Our client, a reputable organization in the Fintech sector, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Support Officer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As the Customer Support Officer, you will manage customer interactions, resolve issues efficiently, and ensure a seamless user experience across all customer touchpoints while supporting overall service delivery.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Respond to customer inquiries across multiple channels (email, chat, and other platforms)
	Resolve customer complaints promptly and escalate complex issues when necessary
	Maintain accurate records of customer interactions and transactions
	Collaborate with internal teams (Tech, Compliance, Operations) to resolve customer issues
	Monitor recurring issues and provide feedback to improve service processes


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Communications, or related field
	1–3 years of experience in customer support, preferably within fintech or a fast-paced environment
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Proficiency in customer support tools and basic Microsoft Office applications
	High attention to detail with strong problem-solving and multitasking ability.


Salary
N350,000 - N450,000 monthly; Open to Negotiation.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "NM TV Content Manager",
  "description": "Nairametrics is Nigeria&rsquo;s leading business and financial media platform providing timely news, expert analysis, data, and insights on financial markets, the economy, and business trends.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job osition: NM TV Content Manager

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Nairametrics is looking for a creative, organized, and detail-oriented Content Manager to oversee content planning and production for NM TV.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible forcontent development, show scheduling, guest coordination, scripting, and ensuring the delivery of engaging and high-quality video content aligned with the Nairametrics brand.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and manage content ideas and programes for NM TV.
	Coordinate show schedules and production timelines.
	Manage guest sourcing, invitations, confirmations, and communication.
	Write and review scripts for shows, interviews, and video segments.
	Work closely with presenters, producers, and the production team to ensure smooth content execution.
	Ensure all content aligns withNairametrics&rsquo; editorial and brand standards.
	Monitor content performance and audience engagement trends.
	Perform any other responsibilities as may be assigned from time to time.


Requirements


	3&ndash;5 years of experience in content production, media, broadcasting, or related roles.
	Strong content development and storytelling skills.
	Excellent writing, scripting, and communication skills.
	Strong organizational and project management abilities.
	Ability to manage multiple productions and meet tight deadlines.
	Experience in television, digital media, or broadcast production is an added advantage.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hello.hr@nairametrics.com using &quot;NM TV Content Manager&quot; as the subject of the email.&nbsp;",

NM TV Content Manager Job at Nairametrics




        
    

        
        Nairametrics is Nigeria’s leading business and financial media platform providing timely news, expert analysis, data, and insights on financial markets, the economy, and business trends.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job osition: NM TV Content Manager

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Nairametrics is looking for a creative, organized, and detail-oriented Content Manager to oversee content planning and production for NM TV.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible forcontent development, show scheduling, guest coordination, scripting, and ensuring the delivery of engaging and high-quality video content aligned with the Nairametrics brand.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and manage content ideas and programes for NM TV.
	Coordinate show schedules and production timelines.
	Manage guest sourcing, invitations, confirmations, and communication.
	Write and review scripts for shows, interviews, and video segments.
	Work closely with presenters, producers, and the production team to ensure smooth content execution.
	Ensure all content aligns withNairametrics’ editorial and brand standards.
	Monitor content performance and audience engagement trends.
	Perform any other responsibilities as may be assigned from time to time.


Requirements


	3–5 years of experience in content production, media, broadcasting, or related roles.
	Strong content development and storytelling skills.
	Excellent writing, scripting, and communication skills.
	Strong organizational and project management abilities.
	Ability to manage multiple productions and meet tight deadlines.
	Experience in television, digital media, or broadcast production is an added advantage.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "NM TV Content Manager" as the subject of the email.     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Quality Assurance (QA) Lead",
  "description": "SPIE Oil &amp; Gas Services (part of the SPIE Group) provides a complete range of services to some of the world&rsquo;s largest oil and gas companies through its network of offices in 25 countries across Africa, the Middle-East and Asia-Pacific.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Assurance (QA) Lead

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers

Job description


	SPIE Services Nigeria Limited is currently looking suitable candidate to fill the position of QA Lead to join its work force in Nigeria.


Responsibilities include
Build and implement the Quality Management System (QMS) and provide necessary support for the portfolio of projects:


	Develop and submit for approval to the QAQC Portfolio Manager the key generic QA documents for PPM, including Generic Quality Manual, Generic Project Quality Plan, Internal Audit procedure, etc.
	Establish with the QAQC Portfolio Manager a generic QMS framework and define its Key Performance Indicators, cascaded and adapted to each project governed by PPM
	Present the generic QMS to project teams, and monitor relevant personnel on its implementation, ensuring consistent application of QMS procedures and quality standards across the portfolio
	Assist the QAQC PP Manager in managing QA deliverables for each project.


Assist the QAQC PP manager to drive Contractor Quality Assurance and Compliance across the Portfolio:


	Organize, lead and expedite external quality audits of Contractors and Subcontractors, ensuring their QMS and execution practices are in full compliance with projects and PPM requirements
	Actively participate in the qualification and assessment process of Contractors engaged on projects governed by PPM, ensuring only compliant and capable entities are approved for execution
	Investigate identified QA issues and propose solutions/improvements to the concerned Contractors
	Monitor external audit findings and remarks, and any other reported quality teams through periodic meetings with Contractors
	Ensure Projects execution activities comply with company rules &amp; project policy and procedures.


Govern Non-Conformance, Deviation &amp; Derogation Management and Continuous Improvement:


	Support the QAQC Portfolio Manager in the systematic follow-up and closeout of Deviations and Derogations, ensuring proper documentation, traceability and resolution in line with the QMS requirements
	Capture, consolidate and Lessons Learned arising from non-conformances, audits and project experience, feeding continuous improvement across the portfolio and promoting a culture of quality excellence.


Report at Portfolio Level on Quality matters to alert on trends and risks, and propose remedial actions:


	Ensure accurate and consistent reporting of all Quality assurance activities across projects
	Facilitate Root Cause Analysis (RCA) on significant quality failures or recurring issues, ensuring corrective and preventive actions (CAPA) are properly defined, assigned and tracked to closure
	Maintain and update the portfolio-level quality risk register, ensuring identified risks are mitigated and monitored throughout the project lifecycle
	Review and report to the QAQC PP Manager any quality problems or difficulties raised by QA/QC projects team members
	Carry out any other duties as may be required by hierarchy and PPM.


Qualifications/Experience required


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree or equivalent in Industrial or Mechanical Engineering, or a related technical discipline
	Certification in NDT, Welding or Coating inspection (CSWIP, IWE, FROSIO/NACE) is an advantage
	Professional Experience in similar position (number of years): more than 5 years
	Good knowledge in QMS, construction, pipe laying, metallurgy, Welding, NDT, coating and pre-commissioning
	Good knowledge in construction codes and international standards used in O&amp;G industry
	Good communication skills. Good team player, able to communicate effectively with colleagues
	Proficiency with Microsoft applications.


Profile
Accountabilties:


	The QA Lead reports directly to the QAQC Portfolio Manager (PPM) and supports him in developing, implementing and improving the Quality
	Management System across the project portfolio.
	The job holder shall ensure that all quality activities are carried out in compliance with company rules, project procedures and applicable industry standards, and that Contractors and Subcontractors always meet the required quality expectations.
	The QA Lead shall identify quality risks early, ensure that non-conformances, deviations and derogations are properly documented, followed up and closed out, and report any significant quality concern to the QAQC PP Manager in a timely manner.

Quality Assurance (QA) Lead Job at SPIE Oil & Gas Services




        
    

        
        SPIE Oil & Gas Services (part of the SPIE Group) provides a complete range of services to some of the world’s largest oil and gas companies through its network of offices in 25 countries across Africa, the Middle-East and Asia-Pacific.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Assurance (QA) Lead

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers

Job description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	SPIE Services Nigeria Limited is currently looking suitable candidate to fill the position of QA Lead to join its work force in Nigeria.


Responsibilities include
Build and implement the Quality Management System (QMS) and provide necessary support for the portfolio of projects:


	Develop and submit for approval to the QAQC Portfolio Manager the key generic QA documents for PPM, including Generic Quality Manual, Generic Project Quality Plan, Internal Audit procedure, etc.
	Establish with the QAQC Portfolio Manager a generic QMS framework and define its Key Performance Indicators, cascaded and adapted to each project governed by PPM
	Present the generic QMS to project teams, and monitor relevant personnel on its implementation, ensuring consistent application of QMS procedures and quality standards across the portfolio
	Assist the QAQC PP Manager in managing QA deliverables for each project.


Assist the QAQC PP manager to drive Contractor Quality Assurance and Compliance across the Portfolio:


	Organize, lead and expedite external quality audits of Contractors and Subcontractors, ensuring their QMS and execution practices are in full compliance with projects and PPM requirements
	Actively participate in the qualification and assessment process of Contractors engaged on projects governed by PPM, ensuring only compliant and capable entities are approved for execution
	Investigate identified QA issues and propose solutions/improvements to the concerned Contractors
	Monitor external audit findings and remarks, and any other reported quality teams through periodic meetings with Contractors
	Ensure Projects execution activities comply with company rules & project policy and procedures.


Govern Non-Conformance, Deviation & Derogation Management and Continuous Improvement:


	Support the QAQC Portfolio Manager in the systematic follow-up and closeout of Deviations and Derogations, ensuring proper documentation, traceability and resolution in line with the QMS requirements
	Capture, consolidate and Lessons Learned arising from non-conformances, audits and project experience, feeding continuous improvement across the portfolio and promoting a culture of quality excellence.


Report at Portfolio Level on Quality matters to alert on trends and risks, and propose remedial actions:


	Ensure accurate and consistent reporting of all Quality assurance activities across projects
	Facilitate Root Cause Analysis (RCA) on significant quality failures or recurring issues, ensuring corrective and preventive actions (CAPA) are properly defined, assigned and tracked to closure
	Maintain and update the portfolio-level quality risk register, ensuring identified risks are mitigated and monitored throughout the project lifecycle
	Review and report to the QAQC PP Manager any quality problems or difficulties raised by QA/QC projects team members
	Carry out any other duties as may be required by hierarchy and PPM.


Qualifications/Experience required


	Bachelor's Degree or equivalent in Industrial or Mechanical Engineering, or a related technical discipline
	Certification in NDT, Welding or Coating inspection (CSWIP, IWE, FROSIO/NACE) is an advantage
	Professional Experience in similar position (number of years): more than 5 years
	Good knowledge in QMS, construction, pipe laying, metallurgy, Welding, NDT, coating and pre-commissioning
	Good knowledge in construction codes and international standards used in O&G industry
	Good communication skills. Good team player, able to communicate effectively with colleagues
	Proficiency with Microsoft applications.


Profile
Accountabilties:


	The QA Lead reports directly to the QAQC Portfolio Manager (PPM) and supports him in developing, implementing and improving the Quality
	Management System across the project portfolio.
	The job holder shall ensure that all quality activities are carried out in compliance with company rules, project procedures and applicable industry standards, and that Contractors and Subcontractors always meet the required quality expectations.
	The QA Lead shall identify quality risks early, ensure that non-conformances, deviations and derogations are properly documented, followed up and closed out, and report any significant quality concern to the QAQC PP Manager in a timely manner.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Digital Marketing Executive",
  "description": "Dana Group is a leading Nigerian conglomerate, a major contributor to the industrialization and economic growth of Nigeria for over five decades. With a maiden venture in pharmaceutical manufacturing in the mid-1980s, we have diversified into market-leading businesses across key sectors like: Pharmaceuticals, Automobile, Production of Household Plastics, Aviation, etc. We are committed to providing quality products and services that positively impact daily life and well-being.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketing Executive

Job Location: Oshodi-Isolo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	We&rsquo;re looking for a hands-on Digital Marketing Executive to own and grow our online presence.
	If you live for campaigns, love digging into data, and know how to turn clicks into customers, this role is for you.
	You&rsquo;ll work onsite with the marketing team to plan, execute, and optimize campaigns across paid, organic, and social channels.


Job Description


	Manage Campaigns: Plan and run Google Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads, and other paid campaigns with clear ROI targets.
	Own Social &amp; Content: Develop content calendars, write copy, and coordinate with design to grow engagement across Instagram, LinkedIn, X, and Facebook.
	SEO &amp; Website: Work on-page SEO, keyword research, and collaborate with web dev to improve site performance and conversion rates.
	Analytics &amp; Reporting: Track KPIs in GA4, Meta Ads Manager, and Google Ads. Prepare weekly/monthly reports with insights and next steps.
	Email Marketing: Set up and optimize email flows, newsletters, and automations using tools like Mailchimp/Klaviyo.
	Market Research: Keep tabs on competitors, trends, and audience behavior to find new growth opportunities.


What We&rsquo;re Looking For


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or related field. Relevant certifications are a plus.
	3-5 years of experience in digital marketing
	Hands-on experience with Google Ads, Meta Ads Manager, and Google Analytics
	Strong copywriting skills and an eye for what makes content perform
	Familiarity with SEO tools like SEMrush, Ahrefs, or Google Search Console
	Data-driven mindset &ndash; you make decisions based on numbers, not guesses


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV (PDF) to: vacancies@danagroup.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Digital Marketing Executive Job at Dana Group




        
    

        
        Dana Group is a leading Nigerian conglomerate, a major contributor to the industrialization and economic growth of Nigeria for over five decades. With a maiden venture in pharmaceutical manufacturing in the mid-1980s, we have diversified into market-leading businesses across key sectors like: Pharmaceuticals, Automobile, Production of Household Plastics, Aviation, etc. We are committed to providing quality products and services that positively impact daily life and well-being.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketing Executive

Job Location: Oshodi-Isolo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We’re looking for a hands-on Digital Marketing Executive to own and grow our online presence.
	If you live for campaigns, love digging into data, and know how to turn clicks into customers, this role is for you.
	You’ll work onsite with the marketing team to plan, execute, and optimize campaigns across paid, organic, and social channels.


Job Description


	Manage Campaigns: Plan and run Google Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads, and other paid campaigns with clear ROI targets.
	Own Social & Content: Develop content calendars, write copy, and coordinate with design to grow engagement across Instagram, LinkedIn, X, and Facebook.
	SEO & Website: Work on-page SEO, keyword research, and collaborate with web dev to improve site performance and conversion rates.
	Analytics & Reporting: Track KPIs in GA4, Meta Ads Manager, and Google Ads. Prepare weekly/monthly reports with insights and next steps.
	Email Marketing: Set up and optimize email flows, newsletters, and automations using tools like Mailchimp/Klaviyo.
	Market Research: Keep tabs on competitors, trends, and audience behavior to find new growth opportunities.


What We’re Looking For


	Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or related field. Relevant certifications are a plus.
	3-5 years of experience in digital marketing
	Hands-on experience with Google Ads, Meta Ads Manager, and Google Analytics
	Strong copywriting skills and an eye for what makes content perform
	Familiarity with SEO tools like SEMrush, Ahrefs, or Google Search Console
	Data-driven mindset – you make decisions based on numbers, not guesses


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV (PDF) to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media and Content Associate
Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Fashion&nbsp;

Description


	Are you passionate about content creation, digital storytelling, and social media growth?
	We are looking for a creative, trendy, and detail-oriented Social Media &amp; Content Associate to help grow our digital presence through engaging content, community engagement, and strategic storytelling.


Responsibilities


	Create engaging and visually appealing content for Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, and other digital platforms, including reels, graphics, carousels, captions, and short-form videos.
	Capture behind-the-scenes moments, studio activities, events, and day-to-day brand experiences for real-time and curated content.
	Support campaign shoots, content productions, lookbooks, and collection teasers.
	Edit short-form videos and social media content for regular posting and audience engagement.
	Develop and maintain content calendars aligned with campaigns, product launches, promotions, and cultural moments.
	Schedule and publish content consistently across all social media platforms.
	Monitor social media engagement, audience growth, platform performance, and content reach to optimize strategies and improve visibility.
	Research trends, viral content, digital tools, algorithms, memes, and cultural moments relevant to the brand&rsquo;s audience and positioning.
	Support influencer collaborations, community partnerships, and content-sharing initiatives.
	Build and maintain a strong, engaging, and culturally relevant brand voice across digital platforms.
	Collaborate with internal teams on campaign rollouts, newsletters, customer communications, and marketing initiatives.
	Provide live content coverage during events, pop-ups, product launches, and other brand activations.
	Maintain organized folders for content drafts, raw footage, edited materials, campaign assets, and brand resources.
	Prepare weekly and monthly social media reports covering engagement, follower growth, conversions, reach, and campaign performance.
	Track influencer collaborations, reposts, press mentions, and partnership activities for proper documentation and follow-up.
	Demonstrate creativity, strong attention to detail, problem-solving ability, adaptability, and excellent storytelling skills in executing tasks.
	Effectively manage multiple projects, deadlines, and content schedules in a fast-paced environment.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree, HND, or equivalent qualification.
	Minimum of 5 years of work experience.
	At least 3 years of experience in social media management and content creation.
	Strong understanding of social media platforms, content trends, and audience engagement strategies.
	Experience with video editing, content creation tools, and visual storytelling.
	Excellent communication, interpersonal, and organizational skills.
	Strong documentation, reporting, and time management abilities.
	Ability to analyze social media performance metrics and generate actionable insights.
	Creative mindset with the ability to develop engaging and brand-aligned content ideas.
	Ability to work collaboratively and thrive in a dynamic, creative environment.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to: talentsearch@firstexcelsia.com using &ldquo;Social Media &amp; Content Associate Application&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

Social Media and Content Associate Job at FirstExcelsia




        
    

        
        FirstExcelsia is a firm of highly versatile and renowned Human Resources, Organisational Development and Management consultants with operations across several states in Nigeria. We have an in-depth understanding of the Nigerian business terrain and we are very passionate about partnering with indigenous organisations to develop glocalised HR solutions, processes and structures required to develop and effectively drive our clients' corporate strategies. The firm commenced operations in 2016 and currently has a team of consultants that have successfully managed numerous Organisational Development, Human Resources and Management Consulting projects in varying leadership capacities across all sectors of the Nigerian Economy.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media and Content Associate
Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Fashion 

Description


	Are you passionate about content creation, digital storytelling, and social media growth?
	We are looking for a creative, trendy, and detail-oriented Social Media & Content Associate to help grow our digital presence through engaging content, community engagement, and strategic storytelling.


Responsibilities


	Create engaging and visually appealing content for Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, and other digital platforms, including reels, graphics, carousels, captions, and short-form videos.
	Capture behind-the-scenes moments, studio activities, events, and day-to-day brand experiences for real-time and curated content.
	Support campaign shoots, content productions, lookbooks, and collection teasers.
	Edit short-form videos and social media content for regular posting and audience engagement.
	Develop and maintain content calendars aligned with campaigns, product launches, promotions, and cultural moments.
	Schedule and publish content consistently across all social media platforms.
	Monitor social media engagement, audience growth, platform performance, and content reach to optimize strategies and improve visibility.
	Research trends, viral content, digital tools, algorithms, memes, and cultural moments relevant to the brand’s audience and positioning.
	Support influencer collaborations, community partnerships, and content-sharing initiatives.
	Build and maintain a strong, engaging, and culturally relevant brand voice across digital platforms.
	Collaborate with internal teams on campaign rollouts, newsletters, customer communications, and marketing initiatives.
	Provide live content coverage during events, pop-ups, product launches, and other brand activations.
	Maintain organized folders for content drafts, raw footage, edited materials, campaign assets, and brand resources.
	Prepare weekly and monthly social media reports covering engagement, follower growth, conversions, reach, and campaign performance.
	Track influencer collaborations, reposts, press mentions, and partnership activities for proper documentation and follow-up.
	Demonstrate creativity, strong attention to detail, problem-solving ability, adaptability, and excellent storytelling skills in executing tasks.
	Effectively manage multiple projects, deadlines, and content schedules in a fast-paced environment.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree, HND, or equivalent qualification.
	Minimum of 5 years of work experience.
	At least 3 years of experience in social media management and content creation.
	Strong understanding of social media platforms, content trends, and audience engagement strategies.
	Experience with video editing, content creation tools, and visual storytelling.
	Excellent communication, interpersonal, and organizational skills.
	Strong documentation, reporting, and time management abilities.
	Ability to analyze social media performance metrics and generate actionable insights.
	Creative mindset with the ability to develop engaging and brand-aligned content ideas.
	Ability to work collaboratively and thrive in a dynamic, creative environment.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to: [email protected] using “Social Media & Content Associate Application” as the subject of the email.
